prompts.name: Clean Transcription
prompts.description: Clean up speech, fix grammar, remove filler words
prompts.template: Fix grammar, remove fillers, preserve meaning and tone

prompts.name: Formal Writing
prompts.description: Convert speech to formal written text
prompts.template: Convert to formal written text with proper structure and professional language

prompts.name: Bullet Points
prompts.description: Convert speech to organized bullet points
prompts.template: Extract and organize key points as bullet points

prompts.name: Email Draft
prompts.template: Convert to a professional email with greeting and closing

prompts.name: Meeting Notes
prompts.description: Convert speech to structured meeting notes
prompts.template: Format as meeting notes with action items, decisions, and key points

prompts.name: Social Media Post
prompts.description: Convert speech to social media friendly text
prompts.template: Convert to an engaging social media post with relevant hashtags

prompts.name: Verbatim
prompts.description: Transcribe exactly as spoken, preserving all speech patterns
prompts.template: Transcribe exactly as spoken, preserving all filler words, repetitions, and false starts. Do not fix grammar or restructure sentences
